assertions.title: Clicking token reference copies address

steps.action: Open app with Optimism unsupported pair URL params to render token-reference error message
steps.expected: Error message includes clickable token references
steps.observed: Error rendered with clickable `USDC.e` and `WETH` token references

steps.action: Click token reference (`USDC.e`) and capture UI state
steps.expected: Clipboard copy succeeds and brief `Copied!` visual confirmation appears
steps.observed: No `Copied!` confirmation visible in UI screenshot; DOM check showed no `.copied-feedback` and no `.token-ref.copied`

steps.action: Directly test clipboard write capability in the browser session
steps.observed: Clipboard write failed with `Failed to execute 'writeText' on 'Clipboard': Write permission denied.`

evidence.consoleErrors: none observed (`agent-browser errors` and `agent-browser console` returned no entries)
evidence.network: N/A (client-side clipboard interaction; no network calls required for the assertion)

assertions.issues: Blocked by clipboard permission denial in the headless automation context, which prevents end-to-end confirmation of the `Copied!` feedback path.

frictions.description: Clipboard writes are denied in this automation context despite the page running on localhost, so copy-feedback could not be validated through the full user-visible success path.
frictions.resolution: Retried by clicking token reference and by directly executing clipboard write in page context; both remained denied.

blockers.description: Browser clipboard write permission denied (`writeText`), preventing verification of the expected `Copied!` confirmation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried click flow, inspected DOM for feedback markers, and tested direct `navigator.clipboard.writeText` call; permission denial persisted.

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-ADDR-003): blocked due to clipboard write permission denial in automation, so `Copied!` confirmation could not be observed.
